purpose: Three-tier agent eligibility registry consumed by enforce-agent-dispatch.mjs and capability-first routing. Returns a single verdict per agent rather than free-form ownerCandidates.

eligible.description: Agent can be invoked directly via Agent/spawn_agent in any governed stage once capability gate is satisfied.

conditional.description: Agent can be invoked only when an explicit patch or runtime flag elevates it. Rejection carries a reason string so capability search can surface the fix path.
commonReasons: requires explicit user approval per turn
runtime-gated — only available in claude|codex|cursor mode X

hard_reject.description: Agent must never be invoked via Agent/spawn_agent dispatch in a governed run. Use alternative route (manual command, hook, or external write) instead.
hard_reject.rejectionPolicy: capability-first gate denies dispatch with hard_reject verdict + reason string. Caller must fall back to non-agent route.
